queries.question: For each newspaper, give me the corresponding sections.
queries.sql: select newspapers.newspaper_name , sections.section_name from Newspapers_Sections join Sections on Newspapers_Sections.section_id = Sections.id join Newspapers on Newspapers_Sections.newspaper_id = Newspapers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?newspaper_name ?section_name WHERE {
  ?newspapers_sections a :Newspapers_Sections .
  ?sections a :Sections .
  ?newspapers_sections p:hasSections ?sections .
  ?newspapers a :Newspapers .
  ?newspapers_sections p:hasNewspapers ?newspapers .
  ?newspapers p:newspaper_name ?newspaper_name .
  ?sections p:section_name ?section_name .
}

queries.question: What sections are there in each newspaper?
queries.sql: SELECT Sections.section_name  from Newspapers_Sections join Sections on Newspapers_Sections.section_id = Sections.id join Newspapers on Newspapers_Sections.newspaper_id = Newspapers.id   GROUP BY Newspapers_Sections.section_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Newspapers_Sections.newspaper_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Newspapers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What sections are there in each newspaper?
